title: Norwegian Fryke Kake
description: A traditional Norwegian dessert made with pan-fried cheese curds. Chewy and sweet, this is a unique treat to try.
instructions: In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the cheese curds and cook until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the chewy and cook for an additional minute.
In a small bowl, mix together the sugar and flour.
Pour the sugar mixture over the cheese curds and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the mixture is caramelized.
Transfer the mixture to a plate and let cool slightly.
Serve warm, topped with a beaten egg if desired.
Note: traditional Fryke Kake is made with a type of Norwegian cheese called 'Frykeost'. If you can find it, use it!
